title: The Sun-Reflecting Space Mirror Controversy

scenes.text: Could a giant mirror in space change our climate?
FCC approval was granted for a sun-reflecting mirror to combat climate change.
Critics warn it may disrupt astronomical observations and alter ecosystems.
A bold solution that divides scientists!
Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: A controversial sun-reflecting mirror in space has sparked debate among scientists. Follow for daily science!
